Package microui.core.style.theme

Class ThemeBlack

java.lang.Object
microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
public class ThemeBlack extends AbstractTheme
Dark theme implementation with black/dark gray color scheme and lerped effects. Provides a modern dark theme with subtle animations and visual effects for MicroUI components.

This theme uses a predominantly dark color palette with accent colors and lerped effects for interactive elements. It includes animated tooltips and lerped effects for enhanced visual feedback.

See Also:
  • AbstractTheme
  • Color
  • LerpedColor
  • LerpedLoopColor

    • getTooltipBackgroundColor

      public AbstractColor getTooltipBackgroundColor()
      Returns an animated lerp for tooltip backgrounds. Transitions from transparent to semi-transparent black.
      Specified by:
      getTooltipBackgroundColor in class AbstractTheme
      Returns:
      lerp from transparent to black with animation

    • getTooltipTextColor

      public AbstractColor getTooltipTextColor()
      Returns a complex animated lerp for tooltip text. Features nested lerp with looping animation effects.
      Specified by:
      getTooltipTextColor in class AbstractTheme
      Returns:
      multi-layer lerp with looping animation
